about.title: About Elite Market
about.subtitle: A curated luxury store for the UAE — we sell and ship our own pieces, and link you to trusted retailers for the rest.
about.p1: Elite Market is a curated luxury store across perfumes, watches and eyewear. We sell and ship our own pieces across the UAE with secure checkout — and for products we don't stock, we link you straight to trusted retailers like Amazon and Noon to buy at the best available price.
about.p2: The luxury market is noisy. Thousands of products, inflated claims, and very little honesty about what's actually worth your money. We exist to cut through that — with a ruthless shortlist and reviews that name the trade-offs, not just the highlights.
about.p3: When you buy one of our own pieces, payment is processed securely by our provider and the order ships from us. When you follow an outbound link, that purchase happens on the retailer's site and we may earn a small commission, at no extra cost to you.
about.v1Body: Only the finest make the list — quality over quantity, always.
about.v2Body: Real pros and cons. We tell you who a piece is for, and who it isn't.
about.v3Body: Buy our own pieces with secure checkout, shipped to your door — or head to Amazon or Noon for the rest.
about.v4Body: A native experience in both Arabic and English.

disclosure.title: Affiliate Disclosure
disclosure.subtitle: How Elite Market makes money — in plain language.
body: Some products are sold and shipped directly by Elite Market. Those are not affiliate links — we are the seller, payment is processed securely by our provider, and the order ships from us.
Other products link out to retailers such as Amazon and Noon. Those outbound links are affiliate links, and the points below apply to them.
When you click an affiliate link and buy on the retailer's site, we may earn a small commission. This comes at no extra cost to you — you pay the same price you would have anyway.
For affiliate purchases we never process your payment or handle your card details. The purchase is completed securely on the retailer's own website.
Affiliate commissions help keep the platform free to use. They never change which products we recommend — our shortlist is based on quality and value, not commission rates.
Prices shown for affiliate items are indicative and may differ from the live price on the retailer's site. Always confirm the final price at checkout.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: What we collect, and what we don't.
privacy.intro: Elite Market respects your privacy. We collect as little data as possible and never sell it.

sections.b: For orders of our own products we collect the name, address, phone and email needed to ship and confirm your order. Card details are entered on our payment provider's secure checkout (Stripe) and are never stored by us. We don't require accounts to browse. If you subscribe to our newsletter, we store the email you provide. We use privacy-respecting, aggregate analytics to understand which pages are useful.
We use only essential cookies needed for the site to function and for language preference. We do not use intrusive advertising trackers.
When you click a product link, the destination retailer (e.g. Amazon, Noon) may set its own cookies to attribute the referral. Their privacy policies govern that data once you leave our site.
You can unsubscribe from the newsletter at any time using the link in any email. To request deletion of your email from our list, contact us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The basics of using Elite Market.
terms.intro: By using Elite Market you agree to these terms.

sections.b: Elite Market is a curated luxury store. We sell and ship our own products, with payment processed securely by our provider (Stripe) and delivery handled by our courier partner. For some items we instead link to third-party retailers (e.g. Amazon, Noon), where the purchase is completed on their site.

For our own products, your order is confirmed after payment and shipped to the address you provide. Delivery times, shipping fees and any return or exchange terms are shown at checkout or on request. Affiliate purchases are governed by the retailer's own terms.
Some links on this site are affiliate links to other retailers. We may earn a commission on qualifying purchases at no extra cost to you. See our Affiliate Disclosure for details.

We work to keep product information accurate, but prices, availability and specifications are set by the retailers and can change at any time. Always confirm details on the retailer's site before buying.
Content on Elite Market is provided for information only and without warranty. Any purchase, and any product warranty or return, is solely between you and the retailer.
The Elite Market name, brand and original content are ours. Product names and imagery belong to their respective owners.

track.title: Track Your Order
track.subtitle: Enter your order reference and email to see the latest status.
track.notFound: We couldn't find an order with those details. Double-check your reference and email.

shipping.title: Shipping & Returns
shipping.subtitle: How your order reaches you, and how returns work.
shipping.intro: For products we sell and ship ourselves, here is exactly what to expect. Affiliate purchases (Amazon, Noon) are governed by that retailer's own policies.

sections.b: We ship across the United Arab Emirates. For other countries, contact us before ordering and we'll confirm availability.
Orders are processed within 1 business day and typically delivered in 2–4 business days via our courier partner. You'll receive a tracking number by email once your order ships.
Any shipping fee is shown clearly at checkout before you pay. Some items or order values may qualify for free delivery.
Use the tracking number in your shipping email, or visit our Track Order page with your order reference and email.
If something isn't right, contact us within 7 days of delivery. Items should be unused and in their original packaging. We'll arrange a return or exchange and confirm any conditions.
If your item arrives damaged or incorrect, message us with your order number and a photo and we'll make it right quickly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about ordering, shipping and authenticity.
faq.intro: Can't find your answer? Reach us on WhatsApp or the contact page — we're happy to help.

items.a: Yes. Every product we sell is genuine. For items we link to Amazon or Noon, you buy directly from those trusted retailers.
For our own products you pay securely by card at checkout, processed by Stripe. We never see or store your card details.
Orders ship within 1 business day and usually arrive in 2–4 business days across the UAE. You'll get a tracking number by email.

items.q: How do I track my order?
items.a: Use the link in your shipping email, or our Track Order page with your order reference and the email you used.
Yes — contact us within 7 days of delivery. Items should be unused and in original packaging. See our Shipping & Returns page.

items.q: Do you ship outside the UAE?
items.a: We currently focus on the UAE. Contact us for other locations and we'll do our best to help.
Prices are shown in AED. Any applicable taxes and shipping are confirmed at checkout before payment.
